title: Twist in missing UFO general as wife says he 'planned not to be found' in chilling 911
description: A case involving a former US Air Force General purportedly tied to UFO research has taken a strange turn after his wife gave the impression that he "planned not to be found"

title: 'It Would've Set The Earth On Fire': GOP Rep Says Secret UFO Files He Saw Could Have 'Unglued' America If Released
description: Rep. Tim Burchett (R-Tenn.) is pushing for complete government transparency on UFOs, telling Newsmax Wednesday that classified information he has personally reviewed would have shocked the American public if released. “It would have set the earth on fire, this country would have come unglued,” Burchett said. “We just need to disclose it all. I’m sick of it.” Layers Of Secrecy Burchett, who sits on the House Oversight and Foreign Affairs Committees, described a pattern of bureaucratic suppression that he said extends to the presidency itself. He recounted a closed-door briefing where he was told the president operates on a need-to-know basis. “I think that says everything. There’s an arrogance,” he said. He also raised concerns ... Full story available on Benzinga.com

title: PROOF! Idaho and Neighbors Learn Government has UFO Answers
description: Photo by Nigel Hoare on Unsplash

title: From skeptics to sightings, Pittsburgh UFO Conference returns to Western Pa.
description: John Ventre has spent 20 years waiting for the world to take UFOs seriously, but now that the federal government is finally acknowledging the phenomenon, he is questioning its sudden change in stance.

title: You can book a UFO on Airbnb and it comes with a TARDIS toilet
description: This unique Airbnb offers an out of this world experience. Not only do you sleep inside a UFO, even going to the loo takes you on a sci-fi adventure thanks to the TARDIS-shaped toilet
